body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44893", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-703", "name": "Improper Check or Handling of Exceptional Conditions"}], "description": "When decoding a PP2_TYPE_SSL TLV, HAProxyMessage.readNextTLV() first calls `header.retainedSlice(header.readerIndex(), length)` and only then reads the 1-byte client field and 4-byte verify field. If the attacker sets the TLV length below 5, the subsequent readByte/readInt throws IndexOutOfBoundsException. HAProxyMessageDecoder only catches HAProxyProtocolException around this call, so the IOOBE propagates and the retained slice on the pooled cumulation buffer is never released.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00594, "percentile": 0.44099}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-cc37-9q2j-3hfv", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-08T19:02:21Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cc37-9q2j-3hfv", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-cc37-9q2j-3hfv"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44893"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-12T15:16:26Z", "published_at": "2026-06-08T19:02:21Z", "references": ["https://github.com/netty/netty/security/advisories/GHSA-cc37-9q2j-3hfv", "https://github.com/netty/netty/releases/tag/netty-4.1.135.Final", "https://github.com/netty/netty/releases/tag/netty-4.2.15.Final", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44893", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cc37-9q2j-3hfv"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/netty/netty/security-advisories/GHSA-cc37-9q2j-3hfv", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/netty/netty", "summary": "Netty: HAProxy SSL TLV parsing leaks retained slice on invalid TLV length", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-12T19:29:16Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-cc37-9q2j-3hfv", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.2.15.Final", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "io.netty:netty-codec-haproxy"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.2.0.Final, <= 4.2.14.Final"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.1.135.Final", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "io.netty:netty-codec-haproxy"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 4.1.134.Final"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Netty: HAProxy SSL TLV parsing leaks retained slice on invalid TLV length
